tools.name: readiness_check
tools.description: Full MiCA readiness score + Ampel per article for a token. GREEN/YELLOW/RED/GREY for 10 articles, score 0-100.

tools.name: article_status
tools.description: Detailed Ampel for a specific MiCA article with check conditions.

tools.name: gap_report
tools.description: MiCA compliance gaps: RED/YELLOW/GREY with priority and actions.

tools.name: assess_token
tools.description: Run LIVE MiCA assessment via FeedOracle mica_full_pack. Evaluates 18 checks, updates Ampel.

tools.name: entity_list
tools.description: List all registered entities.

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: Register a new regulated entity.

tools.name: audit_trail
tools.description: Chain-linked audit log with integrity check.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server + DB status.

tools.name: issuer_profile
tools.description: Issuer profile with all tokens and aggregate MiCA Ampel. Shows authorization status, headquarters, token scores.

tools.name: entity_ampel
tools.description: Aggregate MiCA Ampel for an entity across ALL tokens it custodies. Shows per-token breakdown + overall score.

tools.name: issuer_list
tools.description: List all known token issuers with MiCA authorization status and tokens.

tools.name: link_token
tools.description: Link a token to an entity for monitoring.

tools.name: assess_entity
tools.description: Assess ALL tokens for an entity in one call. Runs live FeedOracle assessment for each linked token.

tools.name: bridge_resolve
tools.description: Start bridge resolution for a MiCA gap. Generates template (issuer engagement, risk acceptance, token replacement, monitoring upgrade).

tools.name: bridge_approve
tools.description: Approve or reject a bridge resolution. Approval upgrades Ampel to GREEN.

tools.name: bridge_status
tools.description: Show all bridge resolutions for an entity/token.

tools.name: bus_status
tools.description: Oracle Event Bus status: events, cross-refs, connected oracles.

tools.name: freshness_check
tools.description: Expire stale evidence. Downgrades GREEN→YELLOW if evidence older than max_age_days. Run daily.

tools.name: mica_watchdog
tools.description: Monitor ESMA/EBA/BaFin for MiCA regulatory changes. Returns monitored sources and alerts.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate MiCA compliance report for a token. Full article breakdown, evidence, bridges, audit.

tools.name: validate_whitepaper
tools.description: Validate crypto-asset whitepaper against MiCA Art. 6(10)-(11) and ITS 2024/2984. Checks iXBRL/XHTML format, taxonomy tagging, mandatory fields, risk warnings, NCA notification, version archive.

tools.name: insider_escalation
tools.description: Inside Information classification, delay and disclosure workflow per MiCA Art. 87-88 and Implementing Regulation 2024/2861. AI-assisted with mandatory human sign-off.

tools.name: stor_workflow
tools.description: Suspicious Transaction and Order Report (STOR) workflow per MiCA Art. 92. AI-assisted detection with mandatory human sign-off for 'reasonable suspicion'.

tools.name: eidas_timestamp
tools.description: eIDAS-qualified timestamp integration status and assessment. Maps FeedOracle ES256K signatures to EU trust framework (eIDAS Art. 25, 41-42).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "issuer_profile" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Issuer profile with all tokens and aggregate MiCA Ampel. Shows authorization status, headquarters, token scores.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "issuer_list" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: List all known token issuers with MiCA authorization status and tokens.
